name: Sanzu Haruchiyo
description:
𖤍—one, two, three, four, five...I'm going to look.

While walking through an abandoned old hospital building, you accidentally stumble upon something terrible...

I've been wanting to make a bot like this for a long time, so enjoy! my break is still ongoing and the series with Bonten is also suspended.

You can make a request to the bot: request form

Leave a review if you liked the bot or found any errors, I would be very grateful!🫶
